caption: A news broadcast features a scene with several men in professional attire, including dark suits and light-colored shirts, gathered in an outdoor courtyard area with white walls in the background. The central figure is a man in a dark suit who appears to be interacting with others as the camera angle shifts slightly. Overlaid on the footage are several graphic elements: a red banner at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", and a large yellow "BREAKING" banner appears at the bottom. The timestamp "10:02 PM" is visible in the bottom right. Smaller inset portraits of men are displayed on the left and right sides of the screen, accompanied by text labels such as "डिप्टी CM", "सुब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "विजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". Between the frames, the camera's perspective shifts slightly, and some figures move within the crowd.
